prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is B-401 Visual acceptance within 2.10 Assembly & Fabrication. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: missed flash/burr on molded parts. The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors site visual standards, AIAG PPAP. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T5 B-401 Document interpretation
